overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage walking through a sunlit ancient Mediterranean city. The character moves from a covered market courtyard through cobblestone streets lined with classical architecture, passing statues, colonnades, and market stalls before turning down a side street.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient market courtyard with vegetable stalls and fabric awnings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered market courtyard passing vegetable stalls and clay amphorae

notable_agents.action: seated person resting on stool under tree shade

entered.detail: wooden stall with green cabbages and produce displayed on tables
tall white marble columns supporting building portico
large canvas awning providing shade over market area
large terracotta storage jars near market stalls
mature tree with thick trunk providing shade in market square

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered ancient market courtyard with marble columns on the left and vegetable stalls displaying cabbages. Orange fabric awnings provide partial shade over the stone pavement. A seated NPC rests under a tree to the right as the character walks forward through the market.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from covered market to open street with cart and blue building

events.description: exits covered market courtyard into open sunlit street with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past a large wooden cart and approaching a distinctive blue building with arches

entered.detail: two-story building with blue painted upper facade and ground-floor arches
white fabric banners hanging between columns of the blue building
wooden cart with large spoked wheels carrying baskets of red fruit
tall white tower or lighthouse visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered market into bright sunlight, revealing a blue building with white draped banners ahead. A large wooden cart with fruit baskets sits to the right. The distant white monument becomes visible as the market awnings pass behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city street leading toward distant monument with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking down the central cobblestone path toward the distant white monument, passing various market stalls

notable_agents.action: person riding horse moving across the street in the distance

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street providing scattered shade
stall displaying stacked colorful cushions and fabrics
circular building with domed roof and decorative top

segments.scene_description: Walking down the wide main street toward the approaching white monument, the character passes palm trees and market stalls selling cushions. The blue building recedes behind as a domed structure appears on the left. A horse rider crosses in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial plaza with marble statues and colonnade

events.description: enters open plaza with large marble statue and circular columned monument
turns left to exit the plaza down a side street

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand plaza observing the marble statue and circular shrine, then turning left

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback moving through the plaza past the statue

entered.detail: tall white marble statue of a robed figure on a stone pedestal
round monument with columns and red base trim
extended covered walkway with many columns and roof structure
circular building with golden dome and statues on top

segments.scene_description: The character enters a grand open plaza featuring a large marble statue and a circular columned shrine. A long colonnade extends to the right while a domed rotunda stands to the left. After observing the plaza, the character turns left down a side street as a horse rider passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: side street with residential buildings and displayed goods

agents.ego_description: proceeding down the narrower side street lined with red buildings and market goods

entered.detail: two-story building with red lower walls and cream upper facade with blue trim
blue canvas awning extending over the sidewalk
burlap sacks and bundles stacked outside the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking down a narrower side street with distinctive red and cream buildings. Blue fabric awnings and sacks of goods line the right side. The grand plaza monuments are left behind as the character continues through this more residential market area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded ancient market courtyard into a grand sunlit plaza and finally down a narrow residential street. It begins under orange fabric awnings and marble columns, passing vegetable stalls and a seated figure beneath a tree. As the character emerges into bright sunlight, the scene opens up to reveal a blue building with white banners and a wooden fruit cart before expanding into a wide main street lined with palm trees and cushion stalls. The path then leads into a grand open plaza featuring a large marble statue and a circular columned shrine, where a domed rotunda stands to the left. Finally, the camera turns away from the monuments to enter a narrower side street characterized by red and cream buildings and blue fabric awnings.
